issues.title: bull live decision-quality path is still blocked by weak 4H structure pockets

summary.runtime_policy: predictor now treats exact live structure bucket support=0 as an explicit blocker; broader same-bucket scopes are informational only

next_actions: keep exact live bucket as an explicit deployment blocker while support remains zero
if fallback is allowed, restrict it to supported neighbor buckets instead of broader same-bucket scopes
continue bucket-level re-bucketing/down-weighting for the 4H collapse features

issues.title: current_full feature stack is weaker than the shrinkage-selected baseline

summary.training_pipeline_status: model/train.py auto-selects recommended_profile from data/feature_group_ablation.json when target matches

next_actions: compare current_full minus lags/cross against bucket-aware 4H variants
separate bull-all improvements from collapse-pocket improvements instead of forcing one shared 4H profile
raise cv_worst and reduce variance without adding user-facing parameter bloat

issues.title: leaderboard deployment_profile is still evidence-driven and hand-tuned rather than auto-learned

summary.current_state: deployment_profile is exposed and more realistic than before, but model lane choice is still manual
summary.target_state: evaluate fixed candidate lanes per model and emit best/stable/production lanes

next_actions: compare standard, bear_top10, bear_top5, and balanced_conviction lanes per model
promote the best lane from measured OOS results instead of hard-coded presets

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_label, regime=bull/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=203, window=100,
